mapper.select: SELECT * FROM grant_masters ORDER BY application_deadline ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grant_masters ( fiscal_year, title, provider, application_start_date, application_deadline, max_grant_amount, summary, target_theme, target_project, target_organization, target_area, required_documents, official_url, official_pdf_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{fiscalYear}, #{title}, #{provider}, #{applicationStartDate}, #{applicationDeadline}, #{maxGrantAmount}, #{summary}, #{targetTheme}, #{targetProject}, #{targetOrganization}, #{targetArea}, #{requiredDocuments}, #{officialUrl}, #{officialPdfName}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE grant_masters SET fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear}, title = #{title}, provider = #{provider}, application_start_date = #{applicationStartDate}, application_deadline = #{applicationDeadline}, max_grant_amount = #{maxGrantAmount}, summary = #{summary}, target_theme = #{targetTheme}, target_project = #{targetProject}, target_organization = #{targetOrganization}, target_area = #{targetArea}, required_documents = #{requiredDocuments}, official_url = #{officialUrl}, official_pdf_name = #{officialPdfName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
